name: @penrose/core

en.when_to_use: Use it for mathematical or CS concept diagrams whose layout must satisfy relationships rather than fixed coordinates, such as set containment, geometric constraints including tangency/non-overlap, vectors, and graph structures. Write a Domain/Substance/Style triple, and Penrose's numerical optimizer solves the layout and renders SVG. Use it when constraint-driven layout is better than manually positioning SVG. Note that this has the steepest learning curve in this batch because it requires three DSL programs: .domain/.substance/.style.
en.why_valuable: Declarative diagram synthesis: describe objects and relationships, then a numerical optimizer solves geometry satisfying constraints such as non-overlap, containment, and tangency and renders publication-quality SVG. Native AI cannot manually place geometry that satisfies constraints; Penrose runs a solver.

data_in.note: Penrose accepts three program STRINGS plus a variation seed: domain (type vocabulary), substance (concrete objects and relationships), and style (rendering plus constraints). These are Penrose DSL source strings, not JSON. Use the self-contained /bundle entry whose root has 14 npm dependencies.

schema.domain: string -- .domain DSL declaring the type/predicate vocabulary
schema.substance: string -- .substance DSL describing concrete objects and their relationships
schema.style: string -- .style DSL containing drawing rules, constraints, and objectives
schema.variation?: string -- seed controlling randomized layout; any string, self-selected by default

spec.note: Penrose renders SVG at the canvas size defined by Style. The container only needs a width; do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 布局需要『满足关系』而非固定坐标的数学/CS 概念图(集合包含、tangency/non-overlap 等几何约束、向量/图结构):你写 Domain/Substance/Style 三元组,Penrose 的数值优化器求解布局并渲成 SVG。约束驱动布局优于手摆 SVG 时用;注意这是本批学习曲线最陡的(要写 .domain/.substance/.style 三元组 DSL)。
why_valuable: 声明式图形合成:你描述对象与关系,数值优化器求解满足约束的几何(non-overlap、containment、tangency)并渲出出版级 SVG;原生 AI 无法手摆满足约束的几何,而 Penrose 跑的是 solver。

data_in.note: Penrose 吃三个程序 STRING + 一个 variation 种子:domain(类型词汇表)、substance(具体对象与关系)、style(如何画 + 约束)。这些是 Penrose DSL 源码字符串,不是 JSON。用自包含的 /bundle 入口(root 有 14 个 npm 依赖)。

schema.domain: string —— .domain DSL:声明 type/predicate 词汇表
schema.substance: string —— .substance DSL:具体对象与它们的关系
schema.style: string —— .style DSL:绘制规则、约束(constraints)与目标(objectives)
schema.variation?: string —— 控制随机布局的种子,任意字符串;默认自选

spec.note: Penrose 按 Style 的 canvas 尺寸渲出 SVG;容器只需给 width,禁 vh/百分比高。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:/bundle ESM,diagram() 渲 SVG 进 node
carriers.widget: conditional:diagram SVG 挂进 node 可行,但 MathJax label 排版首次有 document.body/insertRule 全局副作用
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 求解器纯 JS,无 worker(bundle 内联 mathjax)

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr @penrose/core@3.3.0/bundle/+esm (200): named exports present (tk as diagram, DC as compile, zC as optimize, iI as toSVG, K0 as showError, Qk as isError). dist/index.d.ts: compile(prog:{substance,style,domain,variation,excludeWarnings?})→Promise<Result<State,PenroseError>> (L60); optimize(state)→Result<State,PenroseError> (L38); diagram(prog:{...,excludeWarnings:string[]}, node:HTMLElement, pathResolver:PathResolver, name?)→Promise<void> (L47) — one-call compile+optimize+render+append. renderer/Renderer.d.ts: toSVG(state, pathResolver, namespace)→Promise<SVGSVGElement>; PathResolver=(path)=>Promise<string|undefined> (async ()=>undefined for self-contained trios). bundle grep: createElementNS x23 (SVG), appendChild x76, document.body x3, insertRule x2, MathJax x15 → diagram output is an SVG appended to node (shadow-ok), but bundled MathJax label typesetting has one-time global side effects (body measurement + insertRule). globalStyleInjection/globalDomMutation=yes (MathJax). shadowCompatible=conditional. confidence medium: signatures verified from .d.ts, full runtime not live-probed; heavy bundled lib, steepest learning curve (author the DSL triple).

minimal.domain:
type Set

predicate Disjoint(Set s1, Set s2)
predicate Intersecting(Set s1, Set s2)
predicate Subset(Set s1, Set s2)
minimal.substance:
Set A, B, C, D, E, F, G

Subset(B, A)
Subset(C, A)
Subset(D, B)
Subset(E, B)
Subset(F, C)
Subset(G, C)

Disjoint(E, D)
Disjoint(F, G)
Disjoint(B, C)

AutoLabel All
